violations.text: No person in charge that is certified in food safety was available at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of both ice machines were observed with residue. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned as often as necessary. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2024
The condensation of the walk-in freezer was observed to be freezing over the fan. The condensation and other liquids must drain properly into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2024

Mens bathroom is lacking signage. A sign or poster that notifies FOOD EMPLOYEES to wash their hands shall be provided at all HANDWASHING SINKS used by food employees and shall be clearly visible to food employees Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/02/2023

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/02/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the food storage shelves throughout facility have an accumulation of food residue, other debris and/or dust. New Violation. Correct By: 11/02/2023
